title: The Hen And The Fox
content:
The Hen roosted high on her perch;
    Hungry Fox down below, on the search,
    Coaxed her hard to descend
    She replied, "Most dear friend!
    I feel more secure on my perch."

    Beware Of Interested Friendships
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Hen And The Fox"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
